Update: I FINALLY GOT IT TO WORK WELL!!! I WAS GENUINELY JUMPING WITH JOY I WAS SO HAPPY IM GONNA CRY IF IT FUCKS UP FOR SOMEONE

Would’ve connected a song to this but I’m too lazy. I could find one later if you guys really want me to but I doubt it makes a big difference for anyone (aside from getting to see my music taste).

It’s not a bot remake, I plan to do the remakes off and on.

Another 1k+ token intro message, it’s wordy so if that’s too much just skip to the end. TLDR Gojo makes a Tinder account for Geto and matches with {user}.
